tests.name: bar-chart-4
tests.prompt: Make an SVG bar chart with 4 bars labelled Q1-Q4 with values $85k, $62k, $98k, $41k.

tests.name: bar-chart-6
tests.prompt: Make an SVG bar chart with 6 monthly bars Jan-Jun showing an upward trend.

tests.name: donut-share
tests.prompt: Make an SVG donut chart showing market share split 50/30/20 across three segments.

tests.name: line-trend
tests.prompt: Make an SVG line chart of revenue over 8 quarters with a labelled y-axis.

tests.name: kpi-row
tests.prompt: Make an SVG row of three KPI tiles: Revenue, Churn, NPS, each with a big number and a caption.

tests.name: stacked-bars
tests.prompt: Make an SVG stacked bar chart with 4 categories and two series per bar.
